items.name: 永専寺山門
items.description: 明治末期に作られた旧網走刑務所正門で、大正11年に永専寺山門として移築された。和風と洋風混合の独特のつくり。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the sanmon (main gate) of Eisenji Temple. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Abashiri City, designated on 1979-02-10, located at Minami 6-jo Higashi 2-chome, Abashiri City.

items.name: 鱒浦稲荷神社絵馬
items.description: 漁業場所請負人であった又十藤野が守護神であった鱒浦稲荷神社に奉納した絵馬で、弘化2年から明治8年まで奉納された。

en.name_en: Votive Tablets of Masuura Inari Shrine
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the ema (votive tablets) of Masuura Inari Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Abashiri City, designated on 1979-02-10, located at Masuura 78, Abashiri City.

items.name: 網走神社絵馬
items.description: 又十藤野が航海の安全と大願成就の感謝のしるしとして奉納した絵馬で、文政4年から明治6年まで奉納された。

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property consisting of the ema (votive tablets) of Abashiri Shrine. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Abashiri City, designated on 1979-09-10, located at Katsura-cho 2-chome 1, Abashiri City.

items.name: ポンモイ柱状節理
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 大規模に広がっている安山岩の柱状節理。地質学上貴重な価値がある。

en.description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of the columnar joints at Ponmoi. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Abashiri City, designated on 1983-03-05, located at Daimachi 3-chome, Abashiri City.
